0.title: Inbound packets discarded
0.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries count = avg(netscaler.Interface.indisc.count), by: { `dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface` }
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
